items.claim: Mark Carney mocked Trump at G7 Italy summit (AI video, 'Carney's Line That Triggered Global Laughter')
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — Italy hosted G7 in 2024 pre-Carney; video labeled 'Altered or synthetic content'; AI artifacts confirmed

items.claim: WHO hantavirus outbreak: 11 cases, 3 deaths (CFR 27%) on MV Hondius cruise ship — Andes virus
items.verdict_hint: Supported — official WHO/CDC data confirmed

items.claim: Hantavirus is staged/a hoax designed to influence US elections
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — real outbreak documented by WHO, CDC, Johns Hopkins

items.claim: Hantavirus derived from Hebrew / created by Israel
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — name from Hantaan River, Korea; no Israeli connection

items.claim: Big pharma created hantavirus to drive up vaccine profits
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — no evidence; Andes virus first identified 1993

items.claim: Hantavirus is 'the next COVID' — imminent pandemic
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — NPR/experts: person-to-person spread rare, far less threat than COVID

items.claim: AI deepfake ad shows Ed Gallrein fleeing Trump on a fictional battlefield (Kentucky GOP primary)
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed deepfake — disclosed AI use in paid political advertising

items.claim: AI deepfake ad shows Thomas Massie holding hands with AOC and Ilhan Omar
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed deepfake — MAGA KY PAC ad

items.claim: NRSC deepfake of James Talarico (TX Senate Democratic nominee)
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed deepfake — National Republican Senatorial Committee

items.claim: Trump claimed US and China had direct trade/tariff negotiations
items.verdict_hint: Refuted by China — MFA called it 'false information'; no confirmed negotiation

items.claim: Trump-China partial commercial deal 'lived up to advance billing'
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — deal 'failed to live up to advance billing' per reporting

items.claim: Voter fraud will influence 2026 midterm race outcomes
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — all 37 election experts said 'unlikely'; fraud virtually nonexistent

items.claim: Significant numbers of ineligible voters will cast ballots in 2026 midterms
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — experts unanimous; Brennan Center research confirms fraud extremely rare

items.claim: 2026 midterm misinformation will be greater due to reduced federal security
items.verdict_hint: Supported — expert consensus cited; legitimate concern

items.claim: 网传5月存款计息新规（银行存款将按新规计息）
items.verdict_hint: 谣言 — 无官方政策依据

items.claim: 新能源车企因锁电问题被约谈、立案
items.verdict_hint: 不实信息 — 相关部门未确认

items.claim: Hantavirus spreads easily person-to-person like COVID
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — Andes virus P2P spread rare; requires prolonged close contact

items.claim: WHO hantavirus working hypothesis: land exposure first, then ship P2P spread
items.verdict_hint: Supported — WHO official working hypothesis

items.claim: AI generated unprecedented false images after US/Israel attack on Iran (Feb 28)
items.verdict_hint: Supported — researchers confirmed unprecedented AI image volume

items.claim: Half of US states have passed deepfake campaign ad laws
items.verdict_hint: Supported — roughly half of states per reporting

items.claim: There is federal regulation governing AI in political advertising
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — no federal law; only some state disclosure requirements

items.claim: Trump-Xi summit signaled US 'gave up on changing China'
items.verdict_hint: ConflictingEvidence — analysis piece; disputed framing

items.claim: Three-quarters of 2026 losing candidates will claim fraud influenced outcome
items.verdict_hint: Supported — 75% of experts predicted this

items.claim: Industrial-scale deepfakes deployed in 2026 midterms for first time
items.verdict_hint: Supported — confirmed by multiple sources

items.claim: Hantavirus conspiracy theories claim virus made by Israel
items.verdict_hint: Refuted — duplicate of N004, distinct framing

items.claim: Trump 'Board of Trade' move signals end of US-China structural reform ambition
items.verdict_hint: NotEnoughEvidence — analytical framing, not verifiable claim
